title: 10 Herbal Essential Oils For Baldness
description: Santalum album essential oils contains a compound called santalol, which is a key active constituent that helps with hair growth. This essential oil also contains alpha-pinene, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe an itchy scalp. The antifungal properties of santalol and beta-caryophyllene help control dandruff and other scalp infections that can lead to hair loss.
